# Verification

- [ ] `mvn verify`
- [ ] `sh .github/scripts/verify-release.sh` when native packaging, release artifacts, or supported code generation changed
- [ ] Not run; reason:

# Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and documented where behavior changes.
- [ ] Public behavior is covered through public entrypoints.
- [ ] Unsupported behavior fails explicitly and repeatably.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or generated build outputs are included.
- [ ] No license files, headers, or license terms were added or changed unless requested by maintainers.
